commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=fda5bdfce761644dee0412ee848e68c49dc4df27)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes `localModelLean` embedded runs derive structured Tool Search defaults when `tools.toolSearch` is unset, preserves explicit Tool Search config, and updates focused tests plus local-model docs.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +82, Docs +2. Total +116 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main and the latest release only trim direct heavy tools, while the PR adds runtime-local Tool Search defaults for lean embedded runs. I did not run a live local-model reproduction because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A maintainer needs to decide the compatibility-sensitive default behavior and request the small config-help alignment before merge; this protected maintainer PR is not a safe autonomous cleanup close or repair lane.

target.title: fix(agents): compact lean local tool catalogs
target.body:
## Summary

- default `agents.*.experimental.localModelLean` to compact Tool Search controls when no operator `tools.toolSearch` preference is set
- keep explicit `tools.toolSearch` configuration authoritative, including `false`
- document the local-model lean default so small/local model users get a smaller prompt-facing tool catalog without losing tool reachability

Relates to https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599.

## Verification

Behavior addressed: Lean local-model agents no longer receive a huge direct tool catalog by default when Tool Search can compact it behind `tool_search`, `tool_describe`, and `tool_call`.

Real environment tested: focused Vitest wrapper, docs formatting, diff check, AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate, and targeted Ollama Cloud live provider smoke. Blacksmith Testbox proof is still blocked locally by missing Blacksmith auth, so the broad remote gate used direct AWS Crabbox.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts --reporter=dot
node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"
OPENCLAW_LIVE_TEST=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_BASE_URL=https://ollama.com OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_MODEL=glm-5.1:cloud OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_WEB_SEARCH=0 OPENCLAW_LIVE_OLLAMA_EMBEDDINGS=0 node scripts/test-live.mjs -- extensions/ollama/ollama.live.test.ts --reporter=dot
```

Evidence after fix: refreshed head `8e4648cf39662008936cfd7ea07cb2474f617f67`; focused local wrapper passed `68/68` tests; docs formatting and diff checks passed. AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed with provider `aws`, lease `cbx_43caf7e452b1`, slug `pearl-barnacle`, run `run_730407402e69`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, exit `0`, `leaseStopped=true`, selected lanes `core`, `coreTests`, and `docs`. Targeted Ollama Cloud live smoke passed `extensions/ollama/ollama.live.test.ts` with `2` tests passed and `2` skipped intentionally because web search and embeddings were disabled for this run.

Observed result after fix: `localModelLean` applies compact Tool Search defaults only when the operator did not configure Tool Search, and the embedded runner uses the derived runtime config for control-tool exposure and cataloging. Ollama Cloud still runs through the live provider path with the same checkout.

What was not tested: local Ollama daemon model execution was not rerun because the local endpoint had no usable model list during validation. Non-Ollama small-model API families were not run because no matching API keys or auth profiles were available in this environment.
target.author: vincentkoc
